commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because the branch already contains the intended one-line fix; the remaining work is normal maintainer merge and check handling.; Cleared: The diff is a one-line TypeScript constant substitution in CLI argument parsing and does not add dependency, build, secret, or supply-chain surface. (sha=4bdd9c85a19116b76411f8104fce7db43289b740)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the hardcoded `"--"` terminator check in `src/cli/argv.ts` command-path parsing with the existing `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level mismatch: current main defines `FLAG_TERMINATOR` as `"--"` while `getCommandPathInternal` compares against a hardcoded literal. No current runtime failure is expected while the constant value remains unchanged.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the branch already contains the intended one-line fix; the remaining work is normal maintainer merge and check handling.

target.title: fix: use FLAG_TERMINATOR constant in getCommandPathInternal
target.body: Closes #83902 `getCommandPathInternal` was the only function in `argv.ts` using a hardcoded `"--"` instead of the imported `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant. Replaced the literal with the constant for consistency — if FLAG_TERMINATOR ever changes, command-path resolution will now stay in sync with all other argv helpers. ## Verification Behavior addressed: getCommandPathInternal used a hardcoded "--" literal that was inconsistent with the FLAG_TERMINATOR constant used elsewhere in argv.ts; unified to the constant. Behavior is preserved — "--" is still the flag terminator at runtime. Real environment tested: local macOS (darwin 25.5.0), Node 24, pnpm 11.2.2, built openclaw CLI from this branch Exact steps or command run after this patch: 1. pnpm install && pnpm build 2. pnpm openclaw --help 3. pnpm openclaw status -- --foo 4. (supplemental) pnpm test src/cli/argv.test.ts → 86 tests passed 5. (supplemental) pnpm check:changed → all green Evidence after fix (real CLI output): d3lap1ace@impower:openclaw/openclaw ‹fix/flag-terminator-constant›$ pnpm openclaw status -- --foo --bar $ node scripts/run-node.mjs status -- --foo --bar Invalid config at /Users/d3lap1ace/.openclaw/openclaw.json:\n- channels.telegram.streaming: invalid config: must be object 🦞 OpenClaw 2026.5.22 (4b4be8a) — I've read more man pages than any human should—so you don't have to. OpenClaw config is invalid File: ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json Problem: - channels.telegram.streaming: invalid config: must be object Legacy config keys detected: - channels.telegram: channels.telegram.streamMode, channels.telegram.streaming (scalar), chunkMode, blockStreaming, draftChunk, and blockStreamingCoalesce are legacy; use channels.telegram.streaming.{mode,chunkMode,preview.chunk,block.enabled,block.coalesce}. Fix: openclaw doctor --fix Inspect: openclaw config validate Status, health, logs, and doctor commands still run with invalid config. │ gateway connect failed: GatewayClientRequestError: protocol mismatch ◇ OpenClaw status Overview ┌──────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Item │ Value │ ├──────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ OS │ macos 26.5 (arm64) · node 24.4.1 │ │ Dashboard │ http://127.0.0.1:18789/ │ │ Tailscale exposure │ off │ │ Channel │ dev (fix/flag-terminator-constant) │ │ Git │ fix/flag-terminator-constant · @ 4b4be8ae │ │ Update │ git fix/flag-terminator-constant · fetch failed · npm latest 2026.5.20 (local newer) · deps ok │ │ Gateway │ local · ws://127.0.0.1:18789 (local loopback) · unreachable (protocol mismatch) │ │ Gateway service │ LaunchAgent installed · loaded · running (pid 13136, state active) │ │ Node service │ LaunchAgent not installed │ │ Agents │ 1 · 1 bootstrap file present · sessions 2 · default main active 76d ago │ │ Memory │ enabled (plugin memory-core) · not checked │ │ Plugin compatibility │ none │ │ Probes │ skipped (use --deep) │ │ Events │ none │ │ Tasks │ none │ │ Heartbeat │ 30m (main) │ │ Sessions │ 2 active · default glm-4.5 (200k ctx) · ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json │ └──────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ Security audit Skipped in fast status. Full report: openclaw security audit Deep probe: openclaw status --deep Channels ┌──────────┬─────────┬────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Channel │ Enabled │ State │ Detail │ ├──────────┼─────────┼────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Telegram │ ON │ OK │ token config (8169…WXio · len 46) · accounts 1/1 │ └──────────┴─────────┴────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ Sessions ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────┬─────────┬──────────────┬─────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┐ │ Key │ Kind │ Age │ Model │ Runtime │ Tokens │ ├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┼─────────┼──────────────┼─────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────┤ │ agent:main:main │ direct │ 76d ago │ glm-4.5 │ OpenClaw Pi Default │ 15k/131k (11%) · 🗄️ 96% cached │ │ agent:main:telegram:direct:2135… │ direct │ 76d ago │ glm-4.5 │ OpenClaw Pi Default │ 13k/131k (10%) · 🗄️ 100% cached │ └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────┴─────────┴──────────────┴─────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────┘ FAQ: https://docs.openclaw.ai/faq Troubleshooting: https://docs.openclaw.ai/troubleshooting Next steps: Need to share? openclaw status --all Need to debug live? openclaw logs --follow Fix reachability first: openclaw gateway probe d3lap1ace@impower:openclaw/openclaw ‹fix/flag-terminator-constant›$ Observed result after fix: openclaw CLI parses command path identically to before. `--` still terminates flag scanning and downstream args are passed through to the command's positional/raw argv. No regression in any of the touched code paths. What was not tested: full e2e suite, non-macOS platforms
